desc: Once per turn, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 ft. of an ally of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} that isn't incapacitated.
